\vspace{0.7em}
{\small Both surrogates reproduce aluminium Young's modulus to within a few
percent (ML $2.3\,\%$, MEAM $7.4\,\%$) across all four alloy series; error
grows only \emph{off} the Al-rich design domain --- steeply for MEAM, gently
for the composition NN.}

\smallskip
{\scriptsize\textit{43 basis-covered alloys; MAPE vs experimental data from
ASM/MatWeb~\citep{asmmatweb}. Unphysical MEAM runs excluded.}}
\end{frame}
